headline: Cardinal Health (CAH) Stock Could Be 9.6% Undervalued Despite Rich P/E Signals
summary: Cardinal Health (CAH) has drawn investor attention after its stock closed at $221.77. This has put recent performance and current valuation metrics in focus for those tracking large U.S. healthcare distributors. See our latest analysis for Cardinal Health. While Cardinal Health’s share price slipped around 2% in the latest session, the 30-day share price return of 10.55% and 1-year total shareholder return of 37.25% sit alongside a very large 5-year total shareholder return of 334.47%.
